seoTitle: Alstonvale vs Alumy Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Alstonvale and Alumy Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Alstonvale vs Alumy Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Alstonvale and Alumy Creek.
heading: Alstonvale vs Alumy Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alstonvale, New South Wales and Alumy Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alumy Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Alstonvale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alstonvale or Alumy Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alstonvale has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Alumy Creek scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alstonvale scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Alumy Creek scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alstonvale or Alumy Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alumy Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
